query: SELECT s.id as service_id, s.name FROM services s WHERE s.name LIKE '%Burnout%' OR s.name LIKE '%Blueprint%'; SELECT vs.id, vs.serviceId, vs.videoType, vs.duration FROM videoScripts vs WHERE vs.serviceId IN (SELECT id FROM services WHERE name LIKE '%Burnout%' OR name LIKE '%Blueprint%') LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT s.id as service_id, s.name FROM services s WHERE s.name LIKE '%Burnout%' OR s.name LIKE '%Blueprint%'; SELECT vs.id, vs.serviceId, vs.videoType, vs.duration FROM videoScripts vs WHERE vs.serviceId IN (SELECT id FROM services WHERE name LIKE '%Burnout%' OR name LIKE '%Blueprint%') LIMIT 5;
